Notice Of Motion And Defts' Motion For Protective Order (C.C.P. 2025.420)
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Enterprise Leasing Company's Motion for protective order granted. Plaintiff is precluded from taking the deposition of Dr. Mampalan; correspondingly, defendant shall be precluded from designating Dr. Mampalan as an expert witness, and calling him as a witness at trial. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
